## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content creation progress, review processes, and traffic performance.](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content creation goal: 7 articles/week; GrowthX to deliver, Adventures Group to review](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Communication improvements: Email + Slack for article notifications; Lucero as intermediary](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
  - [Traffic growing; some keywords plateauing (e.g., "Is Puerto Vallarta safe?")](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [New content formats (e.g., cenotes guide) receiving positive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Content Creation Goals

  - [Alexandra Vaughan (GrowthX): 25+ years in marketing, bilingual content creator](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Goal: Produce and publish 7 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Challenge: Balancing creation speed with thorough review process](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Solution: GrowthX to stage some articles, Adventures Group to stage others](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)

### Review Process and Communication

  - [Adventures Group needs to thoroughly review tour-related content](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Current bottleneck: review process on Adventures Group's end](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Improvement: GrowthX to send both Slack message and email for pending reviews](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Lucero to act as intermediary, reminding team of pending reviews](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)

### Traffic Performance and Content Strategy

  - [Record week for traffic across destinations](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - ["Drinking age in Mexico" article performing well (first non-destination-specific content)](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Puerto Vallarta: "Is Puerto Vallarta safe?" hit plateau; focusing on new high-traffic opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Success with month-specific content (e.g., "Things to do in June")](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [New articles ready for review: "Best time to visit" for Puerto Vallarta and Cabo San Lucas](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)

### Content Format and Quality

  - [Detailed remarks from Adventures Group team appreciated for easy adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [New "Cenotes Tulum" article format well-received:](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
      - [Includes history, types of cenotes, tour suggestions, and tips](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
      - [Targets high-volume keyword (7,000 searches/month)](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Importance of consistent heading hierarchy for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)

### Content Pipeline and Ideas

  - [Sufficient content ideas in pipeline (e.g., month-specific articles)](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [Future plans include refreshing and expanding existing content](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana to send email with links to pending articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Angelica to review and make changes to "Tulum Gems" article](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Lorena to review "7 Iconic Things to Do in La Paz, Mexico" article today](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue producing 7 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Adventures Group to maintain thorough review process](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Team to implement new communication strategy (Slack + email) for pending reviews](https://fathom.video/share/nyJ6hXah9dQx9ys9nLy4KjAWU_KeYBn5?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
